name: Planner head-to-head: counterparty market risk pipeline
requirement: Build a counterparty market-risk pipeline that loads daily trade snapshots from CSV across at least three trading days, normalises them into a single Bronze trade table, cleans status='completed' rows in Silver, converts notional to USD using fx_rate, and produces Gold views for: counterparty exposure, exposure by product type, exposure by segment, exposure by country, ISIN concentration, maturity profile, and top-10 risk drivers by DV01. Include a 200,000,000 USD threshold breach validation, BCBS-239 + FRTB compliance tags, and at least one financial_risk report.
